title: GUIDE DOG FOUNDATION - 211info
text: GUIDE DOG FOUNDATION FOR THE BLIND GUIDE DOG FOUNDATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides guide dogs and service dogs to enhance the mobility and independence of those who may need them. Individuals must be capable of taking of the dog. 371 E Jericho Turnpike Smithtown, NY 11787 Eligibility: Age 16 and older who are blind Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (631) 930-9000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (631) 930-9000 Alternate (866) 282-8047 Admissions/Graduate Support Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Service Animals * Blindness If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
